title: Che Chi Chi Chi Lyrics Majaa
stanzas:
Che chi chi chi chi
enna pazhakkam idhu
chinnpulla pola

pithu pudikkiradhe
thottuvittathaala
Che chi chi chi chi

oo vambu pannuva
nee vambu pannuva
adi eppavume ippadithaan
romba pannuva

kichu pannuva
kichu kichu pannuva
enna anga inga
thottu thottu
thappu pannuva

enna pannuva ippa
enna pannuva-unna
ennennavo pannaporen
enna pannuva
Che chi chi chi chi

ennudaya aasai
etti thoda thudikka
unnudaya aasa thatti
vida nenaikka
nammudaya aasa
vekkuthadi thavikka

ennudaya dhegam
othayila padukka
unnudaya dhegam
thondharavu kodukka
nammudaya dhegam
vetkathula vedikka

un kolusu mani pola
naan sinungi sinugiye
kedakka

en vayasu padhaneeru
nee kalandhu kalandhu
thaen kudikka

nee alli anaikka
naan killi kodukka
adi moththathula
thookkam kettu
kannu sevakka
Che chi chi chi chi

nalliravu neram
vennilava tholaikka
nandhavana poova
vandu vandhu tholaikka
vandhuvidu neeyum
ennuyirai tholaikka

nethimudi oram
nithiraya tholaikka
nenjukuli oram
mimmadhiya tholaikka
alli tharuvene
athnaiyum tholaikka

un elavam panju udambil
en ilamai muluvadhum
tholaikka

un salava senja sirippil
en sagala azhagayum
tholaikka

nee unna tholaikka
nana eenna tholaikka
methayila rendu perum
seththu polaikka

Che chi chi chi chi
enna pazhakkam idhu
chinnpulla pola

pithu pudikkiradhe
thottuvittathaala
Che chi chi chi chi

oo vambu pannuva
nee vambu pannuva
adi eppavume ippadithaan
romba pannuva

kichu pannuva
kichu kichu pannuva
enna anga inga
thottu thottu
thappu pannuva

enna pannuva ippa
enna pannuva-unna
ennennavo pannaporen
enna pannuva
Che chi chi chi chi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Che Chi Chi Chi'?

The song 'Che Chi Chi Chi' conveys a playful and energetic vibe, celebrating fun and joy in relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Majaa?

In Majaa, this song is featured during a lively celebration scene, showcasing the characters' carefree and joyful moments.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features talented singers including Harini, Savitha, Shankar Mahadevan, and Viji.

Who composed the music for 'Che Chi Chi Chi'?

The music for this energetic track was composed by Vidyasagar.

When was the song released?

'Che Chi Chi Chi' was released on November 2, 2005.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Che Chi Chi Chi' from the movie *Majaa* is a lively and upbeat track that encapsulates the essence of joy and celebration. It features a playful interaction among the singers, bringing a sense of fun and energy to the listeners. The lyrics reflect a carefree attitude, making it perfect for festive occasions. This song evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, encouraging everyone to join in the celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Che Chi Chi Chi from Majaa is a vibrant celebration of joy and energy, featuring a stellar collaboration of voices from Harini, Savitha, Shankar Mahadevan, and Viji. The infectious beats crafted by Vidyasagar perfectly complement the playful lyrics by Yugabharathi, making it a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their spirits. Dive into this lively track that promises to get you dancing!
stanzaMeanings: What kind of habit is this, like a little child?
It's crazy, it has been disturbed.
Che chi chi chi chi
You will tease, you will tease, you always do this a lot.
You will make a fuss, fuss fuss, you touch here and there and make mistakes.
What will I do now, what will I do? I will do whatever I want, what will I do?
Che chi chi chi chi
My desire is to touch and play, your desire is to let go, our desire is to keep it alive.
My body wants to sleep, your body wants to give a response, our body wants to be awake.
Like your anklet, I will keep ringing and ringing.
At my age of fifteen, you mix and drink honey.
You stay there, I will give you a little bird, in the end, you will get sleepy and close your eyes.
Che chi chi chi chi
It's a good time, the moon is shining, the flower of happiness comes and goes, you also come and take my life away.
On one side, the head is sleepy, on the other side, the heart is heavy, I will give you a little bit of everything, take that too.
Your beauty is like silk, I will take away all my youth.
Your smile, when you laugh, takes away all my beauty.
You take away yourself, I take away myself, like two people coming together and separating.
Che chi chi chi chi
What kind of habit is this, like a little child?
It's crazy, it has been disturbed.
Che chi chi chi chi
You will tease, you will tease, you always do this a lot.
You will make a fuss, fuss fuss, you touch here and there and make mistakes.
What will I do now, what will I do? I will do whatever I want, what will I do?
Che chi chi chi chi
